title: Damp Silky French (Brittany) Monsoon Blanquette
description: A jammy, silky, and comforting French dish from Brittany, featuring mayonnaise and beurre-monte, perfect for a monsoon evening.

ingredients.name: Leek
ingredients.notes: use only the white and light green parts

instructions: Heat 20g of butter in a saucepan over medium heat until melted.
Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 10 minutes.
Add the caraway seeds and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lamb's liver and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced leeks and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the chicken broth, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the mayonnaise and beurre-monte.
Season with salt, black pepper, and allspice.
Serve the Blanquette in individual hot stone plates.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
